text.title: Build Log Content Template Pack Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Build Log Content Template Pack methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Pack covers exactly 5 templates: weekly build log, monthly MRR report, milestone celebration, pivot announcement, sunset announcement.
rule.rationale: Pack covers exactly 5 templates: weekly build log, monthly MRR report, milestone celebration, pivot announcement, sunset announcement.

rule.statement: Each template provides per-channel variants (X / IH / newsletter / blog) with length + format adaptation.
rule.rationale: Each template provides per-channel variants (X / IH / newsletter / blog) with length + format adaptation.

rule.statement: Templates use named slots ({metric_delta}, {hardest_bug}, etc.). Slot-fill ships; freeform rewrite breaks reuse.
rule.rationale: Templates use named slots ({metric_delta}, {hardest_bug}, etc.). Slot-fill ships; freeform rewrite breaks reuse.

rule.statement: Pack names the single founder. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.
rule.rationale: Pack names the single founder. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.

rule.statement: Any template change bumps pack version (semver). Silent edits forbidden — older posts must remain traceable.
rule.rationale: Any template change bumps pack version (semver). Silent edits forbidden — older posts must remain traceable.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-build-log-content-template-pack.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
